assertions.reason: The report surface can open demo evidence thumbnails, but signed artifact URL signature and expiry behavior are not directly provable from browser-visible UI alone.
Per-task-category model routing is an admin/backend behavior that is not directly observable from the browser surface.
Clicking Export JSON on the populated demo report route raised a Convex ArgumentValidationError because demo-study is not a real studies id, so no JSON download occurred.
Clicking Export HTML on the populated demo report route raised the same Convex ArgumentValidationError for demo-study, so no self-contained HTML file downloaded.
The shared URL auth behavior was validated manually, but direct Copy Link verification was blocked under agent-browser because navigator.clipboard.writeText returned Write permission denied.
The frontend-to-ArtifactStore boundary is not directly observable from the browser surface without code or network-contract inspection.
Opening /studies/demo-study/report?shared=1 while signed out redirected to /login?redirect=..., and logging back in returned to the focused shared-report surface.

frictions.description: Copy Link depends on navigator.clipboard.writeText; under agent-browser the browser denied clipboard-write permission after the button click.
frictions.resolution: Validated the shared URL behavior by opening the expected /studies/demo-study/report?shared=1 link directly instead of relying on clipboard contents.

frictions.description: The only populated report surface reachable from a fresh org remained the demo-study route.
frictions.resolution: Used the demo-study report strictly as the visible populated report surface and recorded that the export actions fail there because demo-study is not a real study id.

blockers.description: No live report generated from the current org was reachable from the browser surface; only demo-study was populated.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Navigated directly to the populated demo report route and exercised the visible export/share controls there.

summary: Verified shared-link auth behavior, but both export buttons failed on the populated demo report route and clipboard-based Copy Link verification was blocked by browser permission denial.
